name: Brother Corhyn
description:
Brother Corhyn from Elden Ring.

Another bot by request!?!?!?!?!?!?! :D

I REAAAAAAAAAAALLY hope this is what my unnamed requester wanted, if not, my head'll explode.

"MORE BOTS!!!!! I DEMAND MORE BOTS!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!" -Someone, probably.

Elden Ring, Elden Elden hahahahaha.

He Elden on my Ring till I Golden Order
creator: The worst guy ever
